XMLElement.comments: Account Number of Vendor or Creditor
XMLElement.name: VENDOR_NO

XMLElement.comments: Origin Group as Subdivision of Cost Element
XMLElement.name: ORIG_GROUP

XMLElement.comments: Routing number of operations in the order
XMLElement.name: ROUTING_NO

XMLElement.comments: Type of the Item of the Accrual Subobject
XMLElement.name: ACRITEM_TYPE

XMLElement.comments: Message type: S Success, E Error, W Warning, I Info, A Abort
XMLElement.name: TYPE

XMLElement.comments: Application log: Internal message serial number
XMLElement.name: LOG_MSG_NO

XMLElement.comments: Logical system from which message originates
XMLElement.name: SYSTEM
